attacking_style: Opportunistic late-race infiltrator who waits for the final kilometer to launch winning moves. Exploits positioning in established breakaways rather than initiating them.
team_tactics: Operates with tactical freedom atypical for Dimension Data domestique role. Low team support observed, suggesting individual opportunism over coordinated setup.
terrain_preference: Multi-terrain resilience demonstrated - survived early climbing difficulties yet strong enough to win sprint finishes from small groups. Suits transitional stages with mixed demands.
vulnerability: Early climbs expose weakness, requiring recovery time. Fast sprinters in larger groups would likely overpower finishing speed. Depends on breakaway scenarios rather than controlled finishes.
key_patterns: Infiltrates existing breakaways rather than initiating; waits for others to establish moves
Attacks inside final kilometer when positioned in small groups with slower sprinters
Shows recovery capacity within stage after early suffering on climbs
form_trajectory: positive: demonstrated unexpected resilience and tactical acumen with recovery from climb struggles to victory
